name: ShopNest
description: ShopNest is an online retailer offering electronics, home goods, sports equipment, and beauty products — all carefully selected for quality and value.
about: Founded in 2021, ShopNest ships across the continental US. We carry hundreds of products across four categories and add new arrivals every week.

policies.returns: Free 30-day returns on all orders. Items must be unused and in original packaging.
policies.shipping: Free standard shipping on orders over $50. Express (2-day) shipping available at checkout.
policies.warranty: All electronics come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty.
